topic: My library card has been checking out books for two years in a city I have never visited
title: My Library Card Has Been Checking Out Books for Two Years in a City I Have Never Visited | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My library card has been checking out books in a city I have never visited.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a worn plastic library card with a barcode held over a wooden table, soft afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Public library card. Issued in Portland twelve years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old style public library card with a barcode on a tan kitchen counter, dim afternoon light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I use it twice a year. Maybe three.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a personal day planner showing a date circled with the word LIBRARY, dim desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Got an overdue notice last month. Twenty seven dollars.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper overdue notice from a public library with a printed total of twenty seven dollars on a kitchen counter, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had not borrowed anything in months.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person's hands holding a paper notice with text obscured, dim home office light, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The notice was from the Spokane Valley public library system.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of the top of an overdue notice envelope showing Spokane Valley Public Library in printed text, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Logged into the portal. Pulled my checkout history.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a library web portal login page, a cursor in the username field, dim home office, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two years of borrowing in Spokane Valley. Every two weeks. All missing persons books.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a digital library checkout history list on a laptop screen, dozens of titles in chronological order, the word missing repeated, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Called the branch. They had video. Someone checks out the books every other Saturday.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a quiet small town public library at dusk, rows of stacks visible, a security camera mounted on the ceiling, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Librarian sent me the photo. Same coat. Same height. Hood up.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a grainy printed photograph of a person at a self checkout kiosk wearing a hooded jacket with the hood up, only the back of the head visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I cancelled the card. Got a new one.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of cut plastic library card halves on a kitchen counter, scissors visible nearby, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new card was used the next Saturday in Spokane Valley.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a new white plastic library card on a kitchen table, the barcode visible, soft morning kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing
